arts.ttl: Winning FA Cup is 'not going to change' Man City's 'poor' season - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says that winning the FA Cup and qualifying the for Champions League season will be a "huge success" but not change the reality that they have had a "poor" season.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester City make the long trip to the south coast on Sunday afternoon where they face Bournemouth in the FA Cup quarter-finals. Having beaten City for the first time in their history earlier this season, Bournemouth won't be fearing a visit from the reigning Premier League champions.

arts.ttl: Club’s move for Manchester City player complicated – Target might be moving away already
arts.sum: In the last few days, the Italian press has had conflicting views about Lazio’s potential move for Manchester City’s Claudio Echeverri. Corriere dello Sport had outright denied any links but La Gazzetta dello Sport believed the Roman club’s approach for the Argentine could be part of the Citizens’ move for Mario Gila.
